title: The Technoblade Statue
description: A mod I made to honour everything Technoblade did for us and many others
body:
This mod brings a statue of Technoblade to Minecraft. It's a small mod and I didn't have a lot of time to make it, but I tried my best to make it something special. I hope you all can appreciate what I've made. Technoblade meant a lot to millions of players. This statue is a quiet, respectful way to remember him. 

Technoblade never dies!
